text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Arghhh. What the heck? The pounding's killin' me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
My head's been throbbin' since this mornin'.
Maybe someone's talkin' about me behind my
back...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no. That's sneezes, right? What causes
headaches, then?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Owww. Shouting made it worse. I can't even
crack jokes now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her headache troubling her, Tamamo Cross
tries to keep the wisecracking to a minimum for a
little while.
